phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Manueline portal
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o portal manuelino?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW poo-ruh-TAHL muh-nooih-LEE-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors often ask for this historic entrance; staff provide concise directions to maintain queue flow.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the south facade.

responses.english: Good morning, on the south facade.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão os azulejos do século XVIII?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-ZAWEE-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The tiles are fragile and located in a specific aisle; staff direct guests precisely to preserve the artwork.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão os azulejos do século XVIII?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-ZAWEE-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The 18th-century azulejos depict biblical scenes and are a highlight of the cathedral's Baroque decoration.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Manueline portal
phrases.cultural_note: The Manueline south portal is a prime example of Portuguese late Gothic architecture, featuring intricate nautical motifs.

likely_response.translation_en: On the south side of the cathedral.

responses.english: On the south side of the cathedral.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do claustro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO KLOWSHT-roo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o claustro. Se precisar de ajuda, pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao zelador.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cloister. If you need help, ask the local guide or the caretaker.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cloister. If you need help, ask the local guide or the caretaker.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o claustro. Se precisar de ajuda, pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao zelador.
